score_injection_action: Rank=Disgraced/<0 with close_fail_qa_pass(-5) in recent events signals over-permissive QA passes; this run applies extra rigor to AC specificity (all 11 ACs cite concrete file:line grep targets) and explicitly incorporates all 10 architect findings rather than soft-recording them as observations

requirement.original: Integrate Graphify (code-to-knowledge-graph tool) into the existing Claude Code multi-agent orchestration system as a dual-touchpoint architecture, based on 5-round Claude+Codex consensus.
requirement.clarified: Add two new phases to the /dev orchestration pipeline: (1) a deterministic pre-BA Bash hydrator (graphify-query.py) that injects structural codebase context before BA analysis, and (2) a graphify subagent enrichment phase after BA-QA validation but before DEV. Both phases are fail-open advisory; the full integration spans 3 PRs and 32 files as specified in docs/dev/specs/spec-20260527-061433.md Section 5.
requirement.what: Dual-touchpoint Graphify integration: Step 1.5 pre-BA Bash hydrator + Step 7.5 graphify subagent, with BA Reference Resolution rule, BA-QA fail gates, supporting infrastructure (scripts, schemas, agent prompt, tests) across 3 PRs
requirement.why: DEV agents lack structural codebase context; BA suffers from confirmation bias on ambiguous requirements referencing existing code structures. The 5-round Claude+Codex consensus determined dual-touchpoint is the correct architecture.

included: PR1: infrastructure — 17 files (3 new schemas, 3 modified schemas, 4 new scripts, 1 new agent prompt, 2 modified hooks, 2 new test files, 1 modified test file)
PR2: core integration — 10 files (settings.json, 2 todo scripts, 4 commands incl. commands/dev-overnight.md, 3 agent prompts)
PR3: maintenance — 6+ files (.gitignore, pull.md, 1 new reference doc, 2 modified reference docs, INDEX/README series)
All architect findings arch-1 through arch-10 addressed in spec
excluded: Full graph diff in QA graph_verification v1
Auto-trigger of first full Graphify build inside /dev

AC2: agents/ba.md contains Reference Resolution 6-step procedure and implicit reference trigger words (BA-QA fail gates are in qa.md only — NOT duplicated in ba.md)
AC3: agents/qa.md BA-Validation Mode has all 3 new fail gates
AC4: advisory vs clarification-blocking documented in agents/ba.md + agents/qa.md + graphify_lib.py

AC5: 'graphify' in CP_AGENTS (pretool-cp-checkin.py) AND ALLOWED_AGENTS (spec-check.py) AND agent_types list (hooks/prompt-workflow.py:598) AND test_cp_checkin.py — all three registration sites required
AC6: zero decimal step headings in all 32 modified/created files
AC7: graphify_lib.py uses fcntl.LOCK_EX on JSON writes
AC8: graphify-enrich.py handles nil blast-radius-map with status=skipped
AC9: graphify_lib.py documents all 5 failure states with triggers

AC10: graphify_lib.py defines EXCLUDE_FRAGMENTS tuple — sensitive-data patterns (.env/credentials/keys/logs) from spec §5 Risk-7 + arch-8; filesystem-noise patterns (/venv//.git/ etc) from blast-radius-tool.py:35-38; no false 'mirroring' attribution
AC11: prompt-workflow.py graphify init is no-op when binary absent

AC12: Command Coverage table implemented — /dev Steps 1.5+7.5 active, /redev inherits, /pull triggers graphify-maintain.py update, /clean explicitly disabled, /dev-overnight enabled (sentinel fanout includes graphify + global-update integration)

fcntl.LOCK_EX file locking required in graphify_lib.py (arch-5)

First full Graphify build never auto-triggered inside /dev

root_cause_analysis.symptom: DEV agents implement without structural codebase topology awareness; BA interprets ambiguous requirements referencing 'previous/existing' code without resolving which code is meant
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: No structural context injection point exists in the /dev pipeline between user requirement receipt and BA analysis, and no enrichment phase exists between BA-QA validation and DEV dispatch
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — new feature, not a regression
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: The orchestration pipeline was designed before Graphify existed as a knowledge-graph tool that could provide structural context
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Without structural context at BA time, BA may anchor on a wrong code reference (confirmation bias). Without enrichment at DEV time, DEV may miss high-centrality nodes and module boundaries, causing incomplete or unsafe diffs.
observations: grep for 'graphify' in all codebase hint files returned zero results (inferred: feature does not exist yet)
scripts/todo/dev.py Steps 1-15 contain no graphify dispatch (inferred from Read of file:1-41)
CP_AGENTS in hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py:60-77 does not include 'graphify' (observed: Read lines 60-77)
ALLOWED_AGENTS in scripts/spec-check.py:45-60 does not include 'graphify' (observed: Read lines 45-60)
root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: complete — observations confirm feature absence; this is a new-feature integration, not a bug regression
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Read of hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py:60-77, scripts/spec-check.py:45-60, scripts/todo/dev.py:1-41, hooks/prompt-workflow.py:596-612, and grep across all hint files confirm zero existing graphify infrastructure
root_cause_analysis.located_source: N/A — new feature; no existing defect location

component_chain.role: Reference pattern for FILESYSTEM NOISE exclusions only: (/venv/, /worktrees/, /.archive/, /plugins/, /.git/, /__pycache__/, /node_modules/). Does NOT contain .env, credentials, keys, or logs patterns. graphify_lib.py MAY reuse these noise patterns but must independently define the sensitive-data patterns per spec §5 Risk-7 + arch-8.

component_chain.role: Reference pattern: fcntl.LOCK_EX usage for concurrent write safety — graphify_lib.py mirrors this

Step 1 sentinel fanout — enumerates agent_types as literal strings in Write/printf forms for dev-registry. Must add 'graphify' to this list (PR2 behavior change). Does NOT need Step 1.5 Bash insertion because overnight uses BA dispatch per-pipeline, not a single-requirement Bash hydrator flow. 'Enabled, shares global update' = sentinel includes graphify + global cache integration via graphify-maintain.py.
component_chain.evidence: Read dev-overnight.md:225-267 showing explicit Write/printf forms enumerating architect, ba, dev, qa, etc. — graphify absent. Read lines 889-944 confirming BA dispatch does NOT include pre-BA Bash hydration step.

dependencies.PR_order: PR1 must land before PR2 (PR2 imports graphify_lib.py and references agents/graphify.md); PR3 is independent

development_approach.strategy: Three-PR implementation in dependency order: PR1 creates all infrastructure (no behavior change), PR2 integrates dual-touchpoint into /dev workflow (behavior change), PR3 adds maintenance/docs. Each PR is independently reviewable. All architect findings (arch-1 through arch-10) are addressed in PR1 (arch-1,2,5,7,8,9 in graphify_lib.py/prompt-workflow.py/checkin hooks) and PR2 (arch-3,10 in commands/dev.md + dev-command.md).
development_approach.validation_approach: QA verifies all 12 ACs via grep (AC5, AC6, AC7, AC9, AC10, AC11, AC12) and functional test runs (AC1, AC2, AC3, AC4, AC8). graph_verification field check in QA Step 11 output. blast-radius Phase 2 covers the 33-file mutation set (32 original + commands/dev-overnight.md).

_risk_level_doc: high — modifies shared infrastructure (hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py, scripts/spec-check.py, hooks/prompt-workflow.py which fires on every UserPromptSubmit), 32 files across 3 PRs, introduces new subagent type and new agent registration pathway.
